en_title: True Love Goes Down Into The Streets
en_body:
Following true love down the streets as in a daze
Following true love down the streets as drunkened
Feet ache with future, bitter the faded letter's wings
Hands tangled in yesterday, tormented by farewell...
Oh, words fading away, love passing as though hand severed from hand..!!
Down the streets.. clouds pass aching with sorrow
Down the streets.. leaves fly upon the mad drunken wind
Down the streets.. heels clatter, dust of memory wildly flies
Down the streets.. a day gone by, who in this life has shaken the wounded soul..!!
Clouds seem to have forgotten their road of flight
Yet the wind grieves not to remind them of the way
The indifferent wind drunkenly rages down its pleasure-path
Clouds leave at the temple a few foolish strands of hair, innocent with bitter words..!!
Whose heart has fallen into the immensity of Love's forgotten realm
Whose heart throbs with sorrow, fainting within the body's circling snare
Whose heart forever watches along the road where high heaven disappears
Whose heart agonizes with remembrance of cruel farewell words someone cared not to give..!!
Following true love through a madness of numbness
Following true love along passions still warm upon the body
Following true love sickly stretching with drunken steps as still in a daze
Following true love clinging to yesterday: believing the words you gave were tender..!!
Down the streets: with Love's true feet!
Down the streets: sending word to the resentful wind!
Down the streets: lamenting with clouds that have just forgotten the sorrowful sky
Down the streets: caught in vow-bound hair calling Poetry, oh, please do not forget..oh each other..!!
Following true love down the streets: hoping to call you home together
Following true love down the streets: drunken with sunlight at memory's edge of color
Following true love down the streets: forgetting bitter tears that cherish sorrow
Following true love down the streets: evening slowly holds evening's feet still wandering..!!
Down the streets: true love's feet still entangled in the heart's road
Down the streets: drunkened, drenched in the wine of tears that holds your soul
Down the streets: seeking oblivion, only to remember infinitely more
Down the streets: begging madness to forget the lover more indifferent than Poetry..!!
(For: Nguoi Chet Lukang's Nhac Death)
